pr.title: feat(llm): add Codex CLI provider
pr.body:
## Summary
- add a `codex` LLM provider backed by the local Codex CLI
- register the provider in CLI and server default LLM gateways
- document the auth boundary and add `examples/codex-workflow.yaml`

## Security boundary
RustFlow invokes `codex exec` as a subprocess and captures stdout. It does not read, copy, expose, or persist Codex auth tokens; authentication remains inside the locally logged-in Codex CLI.

The provider runs Codex with conservative defaults:
- `--sandbox read-only`
- `--ask-for-approval never`
- `--ephemeral`

## Verification
- `cargo fmt --all -- --check`
- `cargo test -p rustflow-llm`
- `cargo test -p rustflow-server test_default_llm_gateway_includes_codex_provider`
- `cargo clippy --all-targets --all-features -- -D warnings`

Also independently reviewed with a second Codex pass; it fixed CLI argument ordering and timeout coverage before this PR was opened.
pr.author: 73-SEVENTYTHREE
